description_long: This is a large, fantasy-inspired sword with a dramatically curved, single-edged blade featuring multiple pronounced notches and a sharp, pointed tip. The blade is metallic, with a silvery-gray finish and a slightly reflective surface, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal. The handle is ergonomically shaped, predominantly black with a red accent, and includes a distinct, curved crossguard that provides hand protection and visual flair. The crossguard itself is colored red, adding a striking contrast to the otherwise metallic and dark handle. The sword appears to be a decorative or ceremonial weapon, given its exaggerated blade geometry and bold color scheme. No sheath or additional accessories are visible, and the overall design is both aggressive and ornamental.
description: A large, curved fantasy sword with a notched metallic blade, black and red ergonomic handle, and a prominent red crossguard. The design is aggressive and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved, notched blade and the black handle with a red crossguard.
description_view_1: Edge-on view, displaying the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the blade's curvature, notches, and the handle's ergonomic shape and color contrast.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, showing the slim profile of the sword.
attribute_handle_design: ergonomic, black with red accent, slightly contoured, no visible wrapping
attribute_ornamentation: red accent on guard and handle
